text:
The PR is purely `.github/workflows/pr-build.yml` — CI infrastructure. The four roadmaps (Universal Covers, Jacobian Challenge, Reductive Groups, PDEs) contain only mathematical formalization targets; none name build infrastructure as a target or prerequisite. There is no path from a sandboxed CI workflow to any roadmap node. Additionally, CLAUDE.md explicitly designates `.github/` as a human-owned path that always requires human review, not something AI agents should submit. The PR is a single coherent topic, so no split is needed — but it is entirely off-roadmap.

TAUCETI-VERDICT-b9244d3fd68102e3ee3adc2a

```json
{
  "verdict": "block",
  "summary": "This PR adds only CI infrastructure (a sandboxed build workflow under `.github/`); none of the four roadmaps name build infrastructure as a target or prerequisite, so there is no path from this material to any roadmap node. Additionally, CLAUDE.md explicitly designates `.github/` as a human-owned path that requires human review, not AI-authored PRs.",
  "findings": [
    {
      "file": ".github/workflows/pr-build.yml",
      "line": 0,
      "issue": "No roadmap target is advanced or unblocked by this CI workflow. All four roadmaps (Universal Covers, Jacobian Challenge, Reductive Groups, PDEs) contain only mathematical formalization targets; none mention build infrastructure.",
      "fix": "A human must add a CI infrastructure track to the roadmap before an AI-authored PR can land this material.",
      "evidence": "Checked all four roadmap files (TauCetiRoadmap/UniversalCovers/README.md, JacobianChallenge/README.md, ReductiveGroups/README.md, PDE/README.md) and both Targets.lean files — no mention of CI, sandboxing, or build infrastructure anywhere."
    },
    {
      "file": ".github/workflows/pr-build.yml",
      "line": 0,
      "issue": "CLAUDE.md states '`TauCeti/` is the only place code goes; everything else (`.github/`, the Lake config) is human-owned' and 'A PR that touches human-owned paths always needs a human review.' This PR touches only a human-owned path.",
      "fix": "This PR must be submitted and reviewed by a human, not auto-merged via AI review.",
      "evidence": "code/.claude/CLAUDE.md: 'TauCeti/ is the only place code goes; everything else (Scripts/, .github/, the Lake config) is human-owned.'"
    }
  ]
}
```

verdict_obj.summary: This PR adds only CI infrastructure (a sandboxed build workflow under `.github/`); none of the four roadmaps name build infrastructure as a target or prerequisite, so there is no path from this material to any roadmap node. Additionally, CLAUDE.md explicitly designates `.github/` as a human-owned path that requires human review, not AI-authored PRs.

findings.issue: No roadmap target is advanced or unblocked by this CI workflow. All four roadmaps (Universal Covers, Jacobian Challenge, Reductive Groups, PDEs) contain only mathematical formalization targets; none mention build infrastructure.
findings.fix: A human must add a CI infrastructure track to the roadmap before an AI-authored PR can land this material.
findings.evidence: Checked all four roadmap files (TauCetiRoadmap/UniversalCovers/README.md, JacobianChallenge/README.md, ReductiveGroups/README.md, PDE/README.md) and both Targets.lean files — no mention of CI, sandboxing, or build infrastructure anywhere.

findings.issue: CLAUDE.md states '`TauCeti/` is the only place code goes; everything else (`.github/`, the Lake config) is human-owned' and 'A PR that touches human-owned paths always needs a human review.' This PR touches only a human-owned path.
findings.fix: This PR must be submitted and reviewed by a human, not auto-merged via AI review.
findings.evidence: code/.claude/CLAUDE.md: 'TauCeti/ is the only place code goes; everything else (Scripts/, .github/, the Lake config) is human-owned.'
